- RETURN MAIL - SC-100 / UNABLE TO FORWARD - SENT TO DEFENDANT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED SEP-01-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED HEALTH CARE SERVICES, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT UNITED HEALTH CARE GROUP, INC. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
